questions.question: What U.S. state gave the world Louis Armstrong, Fats Domino, Mahalia Jackson and Jelly Roll Morton?

What future software mogul rigged a high school scheduling program so he would be one of the few boys in a class of girls?

What Aussie was the world's richest model in 1998, according to Business Age magazine?
